items.text: The following risks are considered material to our business based upon current knowledge, information, and assumptions.
items.rationale: This is generic cautionary framing language about risk factors being based on current knowledge and assumptions, a standard disclaimer common in risk factor sections without introducing any specific new risk.

items.text: See “Non-GAAP Reconciliation and Supplementary Information” on pages 35 to 38 for a reconciliation to the most directly comparable GAAP measure.
items.rationale: This sentence merely points readers to a page reference for a non-GAAP reconciliation table, which is administrative/navigational text rather than a substantive risk disclosure.
